title: Senior Financial Analyst - Upstox Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Upstox Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Upstox Asia Pacific Associates in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox Asia Pacific Associates:
Upstox Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox Asia Pacific Associates!
